criteria.criterion: A completion PASS returns a `criteria[]` array with one met-record per evaluated criterion and `findings` stays empty. Oracle: a unit test on `reconcile_verdict` feeding a PASS verdict with a populated `criteria[]`, asserting it is NOT flipped to FAIL and the array survives; plus a test that the `CompletionVerdict` pydantic model round-trips `criteria[]` (proving it is not dropped).

A completion PASS emits a `completion_verifier_pass_v1` sidecar persisting the per-criterion array. Oracle: an integration test that closes a ticket through the gate with a stub verifier returning the new PASS shape and asserts on the emitted event JSON (via the real sidecar emit path), plus that `latest_pass_record` reads it back.

Live end-to-end: running the real completion verifier (`[agents]` extra + API key) on a fixture ticket whose criteria are met produces a PASS with a populated `criteria[]` persisted to the sidecar. Oracle: a live/E2E test exercising the real agent path, gated on LLM availability (skipped with a recorded reason otherwise).

citation.description: All referenced test files exist as real non-stubbed implementations (test_audit_completion_v2.py, test_completion_gate.py::test_pass_close_persists_criteria_record, test_completion_pass_live.py). The ticket comment attests change 692 (crumply-denim-pitbull) merged to main with Verified=+1 on GitHub Actions CI. No xfail/skip markers found on the core tests.

criteria.criterion: `make lint && make typecheck && make test` pass.
